titleStmt.title: SII 17.188: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 188. (A.R. No. 167 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

This refers to a skirmish at Māmbākkam in which Karuṇākara-chchōḻamuttaraiyan alias Śūṟṟiyadēvaṉ, younger brother of Moḻakkan Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ alias Vikramaśōḻa Nīlagaṅgaraiyan died. In order to expiate this sin Ayyāṟan Śāttaṉ alias Rājarāja Śeṅgāṭṭu Moḻakkan is stated to have made a gift of cows for a perpetual lamp to Mūlasthānamuḍaiyār in Tribhuvanamādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Vīrāvatāra-vaḷanāḍu in Rāja rāja-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 10 2
panniraṇṭāvatu rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu vīravatāra vaḷanāṭṭu śrītripuvanamātevi catur
ppetimaṅkalattu śrīmulastāṉan tiruvakkarai Āḷuṭaiyār koyilile Ayyāṟan
cāttaṉāna rājarāja ceṅkāṭṭu moḻakkanen moḻakkan paḷḷikoṇṭān vikkiramacoḻa
nīlakaṅkaraiyan tampi cūṟṟiyatevaṉāna karuṇākaraccoḻa muttaraiyan māmpākkattil pū
calile paṭṭamaiyil Ivanāl van=ta pakai tirun=ta vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Onṟu Iv
vonṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭu .
Digital edition of SII 17.188 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
